title: Tish
writer: Mary Roberts Rinehart, Annalee Whitmore, Tom Seller
actors: Marjorie Main, Zasu Pitts, Aline MacMahon
plot: Letitia "Tish" Carberry, an eccentric New England spinster, lives with her nephew, Charlie Sands, and her two cronies, Aggie Pilkington and Lizzie Wilkins, live in a near-by boarding house. Cora Edwards also lives at the boarding ...
